allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Simplify email verification route - use Laravel''s EmailVerificationRequest

## Changes
- Removed complex signed middleware logic
- Use Laravel''s built-in EmailVerificationRequest
- It automatically validates the signature
- Simpler, more reliable implementation

## Route Flow
1. User clicks link: /email/verify/{id}/{hash}
2. EmailVerificationRequest validates:
   - User is authenticated
   - Signature is valid
   - URL hasn''t expired
3. If valid: fulfills verification, redirects to dashboard
4. If invalid: returns 403 error

## Why This Works
- EmailVerificationRequest handles all signature validation
- No need for custom middleware
- Uses Laravel''s proven verification system
- Integrates properly with User model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
